UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: The profile information for a user, including their learning preferences and progress.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user (Firebase Auth UID).

subject.description: The subject the user is currently studying.

interestCategory.description: The category of interest (e.g., Gaming, Movies).

interestDetail.description: Specific details about the user's interest.

progress.description: The user's progress on the Everest climb (0-100).

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: When the user profile was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: The collection of user profiles, keyed by their Firebase Auth UID.
